metadata.title: Filename Heading Sync
metadata.description: Obsidian plugin for keeping the filename with the first heading of a file in sync

regex.source: text: 'This plugin will overwrite the first heading found in a file with the filename.'
regex.target: text: '此插件将用文件名覆盖文件中的第一个标题。'

regex.source: text: 'If no header is found, will insert a new one at the first line (after frontmatter).'
regex.target: text: '如果没有找到标题，将在第一行（在frontmatter之后）插入一个新的标题。'

regex.source: text: 'All files matching the above RegEx will get listed here'
regex.target: text: '所有与上述RegEx匹配的文件都将在此处列出'

regex.source: text: 'You can ignore files from this plugin by using the "ignore this file" command'
regex.target: text: '您可以使用“忽略此文件”命令忽略此插件中的文件'

regex.source: .setDesc('Type characters/strings separated by a comma. This input is space sensitive.')
regex.target: .setDesc('键入用逗号分隔的字符/字符串。此输入对空间敏感。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Ignore rule in RegEx format. All files listed below will get ignored by this plugin.')
regex.target: .setDesc('忽略RegEx格式的规则。下面列出的所有文件都将被此插件忽略。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Whether this plugin should trigger when a file is opened, and not just on save. Disable this when you notice conflicts with other plugins that also act on file open.')
regex.target: .setDesc('此插件是否应在打开文件时触发，而不仅仅是在保存时触发。当您发现与其他也对文件打开起作用的插件冲突时，请禁用此选项。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Whether this plugin should trigger when a file is saved. Disable this when you want to trigger sync only manually.')
regex.target: .setDesc('此插件是否应在保存文件时触发。当您只想手动触发同步时，请禁用此功能。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Which Markdown heading style to use when creating new headings: Prefix ("# Heading") or Underline ("Heading\\n===").')
regex.target: .setDesc('创建新标题时使用哪种 Markdown 标题样式： 前缀（"#标题"）或下划线（"Heading\\n==="）。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Whether this plugin should replace existing heading styles when updating headings.')
regex.target: .setDesc('更新标题时，此插件是否应替换现有的标题样式。')

regex.source: .setDesc('The string to use when insert Underline-style headings; should be some number of "="s.')
regex.target: .setDesc('插入下划线样式标题时使用的字符串；应该是一些“=”s。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Delay in milliseconds before renaming the file after typing stops. This prevents frequent renames while typing. Default is 1000ms (2 seconds).')
regex.target: .setDesc('键入停止后重命名文件之前的延迟（毫秒）。这可以防止在键入时频繁重命名。默认值为1000ms（2秒）。')
